queue.title: Add checked corner-permutation coordinate

Cover solved-state and shallow-move deterministic fixtures plus duplicate, missing, and invalid-index cases. Do not add edge permutation coordinates, pruning tables, search changes, or solver selection changes.

queue.title: Define pruning-table storage boundary
queue.prompt: After checked orientation, UD-slice combination, corner permutation, slice-edge permutation, and U/D edge permutation coordinate helpers exist, define the internal boundary for deterministic two-phase pruning tables before generating real data. Add compact table types, metadata, checked lookup behavior, and storage or gitignore policy for future generated artifacts. Keep the step code-focused and small; do not commit large generated tables or alter product solver defaults.

queue.title: Add deterministic two-phase engine baseline
queue.prompt: Integrate the two-phase coordinate helpers and pruning-table lookup boundary into a deterministic cube-engine solver path behind explicit SolverConfig selection. Keep the existing bounded solver as the default product path, verify returned moves by replay, report limits and explored nodes honestly, and avoid claiming optimality or a 20-move guarantee.
